message:
feat(store): lazy per-field TTL expiry on hash-read paths + HDEL/whole-key cleanup (br-frankenredis-b8ut, rv89 part 3)

Wires the fr-store hash-read surface to the per-field TTL map so
expired fields are invisible to HGET/HEXISTS/HMGET/HLEN/HGETALL/HKEYS/
HVALS/HSTRLEN/HSCAN/HRANDFIELD and HRANDFIELD count. HDEL now clears
any per-field TTL entries for the removed fields so re-added fields of
the same name don't inherit stale TTLs. Whole-key removal
(internal_entries_remove) clears the entire per-key section of the
field_expires map.

Implementation:
  - Store::drop_hash_field_if_expired(key, field, now_ms) — targeted
    single-field reap used before hget/hexists/hmget/hstrlen read.
  - Store::drop_expired_hash_fields(key, now_ms) — bulk sweep used
    before hlen/hgetall/hkeys/hvals/hscan/hrandfield.
  - Both drop the field from the hash value, drop its TTL entry, bump
    dirty + stat_expired_keys, and — crucially — remove the whole hash
    key if the last field just got reaped (matches upstream 7.4).
  - hdel hooked to hash_field_ttl_clear_for_field so subsequent writes
    to the same field name start fresh.
  - internal_entries_remove hooked to hash_field_ttl_clear_for_key.

Tests added to crates/fr-store/tests/hash_field_ttl.rs (7 new, 23
total): hget/hgetall/hkeys/hvals/hmget/hexists all filter out expired
fields; reaping the last field deletes the whole hash key; HDEL clears
the per-field TTL entry; whole-key DEL clears every field TTL. All 23
pass; fr-store overall 280/0; fr-command 619/0; fr-runtime 272/0;
workspace clippy clean.

Consumers still pending in part 4 (3jrv): OBJECT ENCODING listpack_ex,
keyspace notifications for hexpire/hpersist/hexpired, DEBUG OBJECT
expired_fields, RDB types 20-23, AOF propagation.

Co-Authored-By: cc-redis <noreply@anthropic.com>
